stories.title: Add support tables to Supabase Realtime publication
acceptance: support_messages added to supabase_realtime publication
support_tickets confirmed in supabase_realtime publication
Realtime events fire on INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE for both tables
Migration is idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS pattern)

stories.title: Auto-create in-app notifications on support events
acceptance: DB trigger on support_messages INSERT creates notification for ticket owner when sender_type='agent'
DB trigger on support_messages INSERT creates notification for platform admins when sender_type='user'
DB trigger on support_tickets UPDATE (status change) creates notification for ticket owner
Notifications have correct category='support', entity_type='support_ticket', entity_id, action_url
No duplicate notifications for the message sender themselves

stories.title: Auto-trigger email+Slack notifications on new messages and status changes
acceptance: DB trigger on support_messages INSERT calls support-ticket-notification edge function via pg_net with event='new_reply'
DB trigger on support_tickets UPDATE (status change) calls edge function via pg_net with event='status_changed'
pg_net calls use SUPABASE_URL and service_role key from vault or env
Existing manual call from useSupportTickets (ticket creation) still works alongside trigger

stories.title: Add internal notes support to support_messages
acceptance: is_internal BOOLEAN DEFAULT false column added to support_messages
RLS policy updated: users cannot SELECT messages where is_internal=true
Platform admin and org admin policies unchanged (can see all)
Existing data unaffected (all existing messages get is_internal=false)

stories.title: Update hooks and UI for internal notes
acceptance: useSupportMessages filters out is_internal=true for non-admin users
useSendSupportMessage accepts is_internal parameter
SupportAgentDashboard shows internal notes with visual distinction (yellow/muted badge)
Internal note toggle in message compose area for admins

stories.title: Create support_canned_responses table and hook
acceptance: support_canned_responses table created with id, org_id (nullable), title, content, category, shortcut, created_by, created_at, updated_at
RLS: platform admins can CRUD all, org admins can CRUD their org's responses
Indexes on org_id and category
React hook useCannedResponses with list, create, update, delete mutations

stories.title: Canned responses UI in admin dashboard
acceptance: Canned response picker dropdown in message compose area
Clicking a canned response inserts its content into the message field
Manage canned responses panel (create, edit, delete) accessible from settings or support dashboard
Category filter in picker for quick search

stories.title: Add SLA tracking columns and auto-calculation
acceptance: first_response_at TIMESTAMPTZ column added (auto-set on first agent reply via trigger)
sla_response_hours INTEGER column added (default based on priority: urgent=1, high=4, medium=8, low=24)
sla_breached BOOLEAN DEFAULT false column added (auto-set by trigger when NOW() > created_at + sla_response_hours AND first_response_at IS NULL)
Trigger recalculates sla_breached on ticket update and periodically

stories.title: SLA display in admin support UI
acceptance: SLA countdown badge on ticket list (time remaining to first response)
Visual indicator when SLA is breached (red badge)
First response time displayed on resolved tickets
useSupportTickets hook updated to include SLA columns

stories.title: Fix support RLS policies to use is_admin_optimized()
acceptance: support_tickets_platform_admin_select uses is_admin_optimized() instead of inline SELECT
support_tickets_platform_admin_update uses is_admin_optimized()
support_messages_platform_admin_select uses is_admin_optimized()
support_messages_platform_admin_insert uses is_admin_optimized()

stories.title: Add Realtime subscription to support_messages hook
acceptance: useSupportMessages subscribes to realtime changes on support_messages filtered by ticket_id
New messages appear instantly without page refresh
Subscription cleaned up on unmount
Works for both web dashboard and Electron (same Supabase client)
